note: Full recalibration after 5-month drift (old baseline unreachable: addons repos consolidated into godot-addons.git on 2026-03-15). 12 docs, +807/-328 via 2 audit agents + 3 fix agents. Removed hallucinated APIs (get_game_state, set_pre_change, skill.get_meta); synced line-3 restructure (core/playback, stdlib/projectile, PlaybackData, gating helpers, kind constants); added World-owns-Battle (WorldGameplayInstance/BattleProcedure), ActorId, stacks-as-first-class, Break mechanism, Action 4-layer contract, cross-attr clamp, new GameEvents; rewrote example docs to current builder API.
